codeReview.summary: The feature correctly synthesized `docs/code-review/README.md`, `docs/code-review/coverage-matrix.md`, and `docs/code-review/risk-register.md`, including the mandatory-angle matrix, stable source-linked register IDs, and the mission-level evidence constraints. The transcript skeleton, handoff assertions, commit diff, and current document contents support VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-002; the later README staleness after the backlog artifact landed is introduced by the separate backlog feature and is handled in that review.

summary: PASS. The evidence-synthesis feature established the required cross-area coverage matrix and centralized risk register without scrutiny-level defects in its own diff.
